data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: Instagram uses microservices architecture to handle a large number of concurrent users.
data.technical_spec: Deployment on Kubernetes with Docker containers.

data.title: Graph Database for Relationships
data.description: Utilizes graph database for managing relationships and connections.
data.technical_spec: Integration with graph databases like Neo4j.

data.title: RESTful API
data.description: Provides RESTful APIs to facilitate interaction between services.

data.title: CDN Integration
data.description: Content Delivery Network to deliver images and videos efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes CDNs like Akamai and Cloudflare.

data.title: Serverless Computing for Async Tasks
data.description: Offloads background tasks using serverless functions.
data.technical_spec: AWS Lambda or Google Cloud Functions.
